patches.description: Set the constructor virtual-input default to false
patches.rationale: Select UU's existing user-mode SendInput path instead of the unavailable gvinput.sys path.

patches.description: Ignore the persisted virtual-input setting in the constructor
patches.rationale: Keep startup on the user-mode input path even when the stored Windows setting requests the kernel driver.

patches.description: Return false from the virtual-input setting read
patches.rationale: Prevent a later settings refresh from switching back to the unavailable kernel path.

patches.description: Store false in the runtime virtual-input setter
patches.rationale: Keep runtime control messages from restoring the kernel-driver path.

review.method: Windows behavior comparison, string cross-references, targeted objdump disassembly, xxd byte capture, and end-to-end controller testing
